title: salix dissa var. dissa
intro: Salix dissa var. dissa is a lesser-known variety of the Salix genus, commonly referred to as the willow family, and is also known as the Chinese paper willow. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Salix dissa var. dissa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions, such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Salix dissa var. dissa typically involve boiling the bark and leaves to create a tea or infusion, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
